HERO.SUBTITLE: Frontend Experience Architect
HERO.DESCRIPTION: I transform complex business requirements into scalable, performant, and above all, human interfaces.

ABOUT.BIO_P1: I am not just a programmer who writes code; I am a software engineer specialized in the Angular ecosystem, dedicated to transforming complex business requirements into scalable, performant, and above all, human user interfaces.
ABOUT.BIO_P2_PRE: My work philosophy is based on a simple premise:
ABOUT.BIO_P2_QUOTE: the code must be as clean as the experience it generates.
ABOUT.BIO_P2_POST: I've stopped seeing Angular as a simple framework to understand it as a robust engineering platform.

ARCHITECTURE.TITLE: Scalable Architecture
ARCHITECTURE.DESC: Design of Clean Architecture, domain-driven design, and Microfrontends with Nx.

STATE.TITLE: Reactive State
STATE.DESC: Advanced management with NgRx, Signals, and RxJS for predictive flows without race conditions.

PERFORMANCE.TITLE: Extreme Performance
PERFORMANCE.DESC: Optimization of Change Detection, OnPush, lazy loading, and web vitals.

LEADERSHIP.TITLE: Leadership & Mentoring
LEADERSHIP.DESC: I empower teams through code reviews, best practices, and constant mentoring.

SKILLS.DESC: The tools I use daily to build robust and scalable enterprise software.

SOLUTIONS.DESC: Not just 'make it work', but 'make it last'. Focused on solving real business problems with scalable code.

ARCHITECTURE.TITLE: Scalable Frontend Architecture
ARCHITECTURE.DESC: I design robust architectures based on Clean Architecture and Domain-Driven Design (DDD). I implement monorepos with Nx to share code efficiently and maintain clear boundaries between domains.
ARCHITECTURE.ACHIEVEMENT: Migration of a monolithic app to Nx with 30+ scalable libraries.

PERFORMANCE.TITLE: Performance Optimization
PERFORMANCE.DESC: I audit and optimize slow applications. I implement advanced lazy loading strategies, fine-tune Change Detection (OnPush), and eliminate memory leaks using pure RxJS.
PERFORMANCE.ACHIEVEMENT: 40% reduction in TTI (Time to Interactive) in complex dashboards.

STATE.TITLE: Reactive State Management
STATE.DESC: I implement predictable state architectures. From complex enterprise flows with NgRx to modern, lightweight reactivity using Angular Signals.
STATE.ACHIEVEMENT: Elimination of race conditions in real-time purchasing flows.

LEADERSHIP.TITLE: Technical Leadership & Mentoring
LEADERSHIP.DESC: I guide development teams to adopt best practices. I establish strict CI/CD rules, ESLint, Prettier, and conduct constructive code reviews to level up the team.
LEADERSHIP.ACHIEVEMENT: Mentored 10+ junior/ssr developers to senior roles.

UI.TITLE: Premium User Interfaces (UI/UX)
UI.DESC: I build pixel-perfect interfaces with Tailwind CSS and Angular Material, prioritizing accessibility (A11y) and creating reusable, agnostic component design systems.
UI.ACHIEVEMENT: Inclusive and professional applications from the ground up.

DEVOPS.TITLE: DevOps & Tooling
DEVOPS.DESC: I automate everything. I set up GitHub Actions workflows, Dockerize applications for consistent environments, and manage semantic versioning with GitFlow.

PROJECTS.DESC: Personal projects and technical tests that reflect my passion for development and code quality.

BANDMATE.TITLE: Bandmate
BANDMATE.DESC: Platform for musicians to collaborate on songs, chords, and arrangements. Includes an auto-scroll practice mode, setlist management, and community features.

NAOLOGIC.TITLE: Naologic Timeline
NAOLOGIC.DESC: Technical test developed for Naologic: an interactive two-pane timeline view with drag & drop, overlap detection, and work order management.

FOOTER.BIO: Frontend Experience Architect. Software engineer specialized in Angular, dedicated to creating scalable, performant, and human interfaces.
FOOTER.TALK_DESC: Do you have a project in mind or want to grab a virtual coffee? ☕ Don't hesitate to contact me.
FOOTER.RIGHTS: Designed and developed with 💜 and Angular 21
FOOTER.QUOTE: The code must be as clean as the experience it generates.
